title: Am I Actually the Strongest?
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode season. Manga ongoing (current ch. 145); AniList does not track chapter counts for this series so figures are sourced from tracking sites. Confirmed boundaries: Volume 1 = ch. 1-6, Volume 5 = ch. 26-32, and the anime ends at ch. 36 (partway into Volume 6). Chapter splits for episodes 1-8 are approximate, extrapolated from those confirmed volume boundaries since per-episode chapter data isn't publicly documented.
